title: LLMOps · Safety, privacy, security, and red teaming
focus: Prepare for interviews that probe prompt injection, data leakage, jailbreaks, policy, and human escalation.

items.label: Explain prompt injection and data exfiltration in tool/RAG systems
Create a red-team checklist for jailbreaks, unsafe advice, PII leakage, and tool abuse
Design human escalation for high-risk or low-confidence outputs

interviewQuestions: How do you defend a RAG system against prompt injection?
What should trigger human review in an AI support agent?
How do privacy and audit requirements change your logging plan?
